command:
python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
from neo4j import GraphDatabase
import os
driver = GraphDatabase.driver(os.getenv('NEO4J_URI'), auth=(os.getenv('NEO4J_USERNAME','neo4j'), os.getenv('NEO4J_PASSWORD')))
with driver.session() as s:
    si = s.run('MATCH (si:SentryIssue) WHERE si.resolved = false RETURN si.issue_id, si.title, si.category, si.culprit ORDER BY si.timestamp DESC LIMIT 5').data()
    lp = s.run('MATCH (lp:LongTermPattern) RETURN lp.domain, lp.task_id, lp.description ORDER BY lp.StartDate DESC LIMIT 5').data()
    te = s.run('MATCH (te:TaskExecution) RETURN te.task_type, te.lead_invoked, te.quality_gate_passed, te.loop_count ORDER BY te.created_at DESC LIMIT 20').data()
    sk = s.run('MATCH (sk:SkillDef) WHERE sk.trigger_count > 0 RETURN sk.name, sk.quality_score, sk.trigger_count ORDER BY sk.trigger_count DESC LIMIT 10').data()
    ip = s.run('MATCH (ip:ImprovementProposal) WHERE ip.status = \"pending\" RETURN ip.proposal_id, ip.title, ip.created_at').data()
driver.close()
print('SentryIssues:', si)
print('LongTermPatterns:', lp)
print('TaskExecutions:', len(te))
print('Skills:', sk)
print('ImprovementProposals:', ip)
"

python -c "
from neo4j import GraphDatabase
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()

driver = GraphDatabase.driver(os.getenv('NEO4J_URI'), auth=(os.getenv('NEO4J_USERNAME','neo4j'), os.getenv('NEO4J_PASSWORD')))
with driver.session() as s:
    # Get infrastructure files
    infra = s.run('''
        MATCH (f:File)
        WHERE f.file_path CONTAINS 'docker-compose' OR f.file_path CONTAINS 'Dockerfile' OR f.file_path CONTAINS 'nginx'
        RETURN f.file_path LIMIT 10
    ''').data()
    
    # Get auth/billing files
    auth = s.run('''
        MATCH (f:File)
        WHERE f.file_path CONTAINS 'auth' OR f.file_path CONTAINS 'stripe' OR f.file_path CONTAINS 'billing'
        RETURN f.file_path LIMIT 10
    ''').data()
    
    # Get API files
    api = s.run('''
        MATCH (f:File)
        WHERE f.file_path CONTAINS 'api/v1'
        RETURN f.file_path LIMIT 15
    ''').data()
    
    # Get planning docs for phases 14-15
    plans = s.run('''
        MATCH (p:PlanningDoc)
        WHERE p.file_path CONTAINS 'future-production' OR p.file_path CONTAINS 'phase/14' OR p.file_path CONTAINS 'phase/15'
        RETURN p.file_path LIMIT 10
    ''').data()

driver.close()
print('Infrastructure files:', [f['f.file_path'] for f in infra])
print('Auth/Billing files:', [f['f.file_path'] for f in auth])
print('API files:', [f['f.file_path'] for f in api])
print('Planning docs:', [f['p.file_path'] for f in plans])
"

python -c "import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(); from neo4j import GraphDatabase; driver = GraphDatabase.driver(os.getenv('NEO4J_URI'), auth=(os.getenv('NEO4J_USER','neo4j'), os.getenv('NEO4J_PASSWORD'))); session = driver.session(); result = session.run('MATCH (n) RETURN labels(n)[0] as label, count(*) as count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10'); print('\\n'.join([f\"{r['label']}: {r['count']}\" for r in result])); session.close(); driver.close()"

session_focus: Forensic Partnership model routing + oracle architecture

decisions.decision: All agents moved from letta/auto to lc-openrouter/* per model-rationale.md v2.0
decisions.rationale: letta/auto uses Letta credit pool which was failing; OpenRouter routes through OPENROUTER_API_KEY

decisions.decision: Model diversity enforced — watson=claude-opus-4.6 only Anthropic; commander=grok-4.1-fast; engineering=gpt-5.3-codex; forensic=deepseek-v3.2; infra=glm-5; design=kimi-k2.5; project=gemini-3.1-pro-preview; bundle=gemini-3-flash-preview; task-observer=gemini-2.5-flash-lite; validator=gpt-5-mini
decisions.rationale: Diversity of thought, cost efficiency, no Anthropic monoculture

decisions.decision: Perplexity Sonar + Tongyi DeepResearch as research engine — direct OpenRouter API calls, not Letta base models
decisions.rationale: Not in Letta registry; urgency=high->Sonar, urgency=low->Tongyi
Multi-PC workflow: git pull gives full oracle.py/skills setup on any machine

decisions.decision: aura-oracle wired as universal read gateway — Commander LOAD uses ask(domain=project)
decisions.rationale: Consistency, schema evolution isolation, all agents get new blocks automatically

decisions.decision: oracle.py schema_task guard removed — empty results ARE the GHOST_DATA signal
decisions.rationale: Hardcoded skip was preventing Tasks 6-9 blocks from ever running even after sprint

decisions.decision: oracle ask() returns gaps[] — task-observer detects pattern, fires ImprovementProposal targeting sync script
decisions.rationale: Layer 0 self-healing: graph gaps auto-surface as actionable proposals
v1 had no Forensic Partnership, stale model refs, no P-LOAD definition, raw Cypher in LOAD step

next_steps: Run sync_orchestration.py with new agent IDs to update AgentDef nodes in Aura
Run graph sprint Task 6 (sync_routes_tasks.py) — oracle will surface this via gaps[]
Test Commander on Phase 18.3 real task
Commit reports/shopify-b2b-*.md and scripts/verification/ or add to gitignore
